title: The Matrix
summary: A computer programmer discovers reality is a simulated construct created by intelligent machines.

title: Blade Runner
summary: A special police officer hunts down bioengineered humans called replicants who have escaped to Earth.

title: Ex Machina
summary: A young programmer is asked to evaluate the consciousness of an advanced humanoid robot at a remote estate.

title: The Notebook
summary: A young couple in 1940s South Carolina fall passionately in love over a single summer before war separates them.

title: Pride and Prejudice
summary: A sharp-tongued young woman meets a proud, wealthy gentleman she initially despises in Regency-era England.

title: When Harry Met Sally
summary: Two friends meet on a road trip and spend a decade arguing whether men and women can ever be just friends.

title: The Shining
summary: A writer takes a winter caretaker job at a remote snowbound hotel and descends into supernatural madness.

title: The Exorcist
summary: Two Catholic priests are summoned to perform an exorcism on a young girl possessed by a malevolent demon.

title: The Conjuring
summary: Paranormal investigators are called to a Rhode Island farmhouse where a family is terrorized by an unseen presence.

title: Die Hard
summary: A New York cop becomes the lone hero when heavily armed thieves seize a Los Angeles office tower at Christmas.

title: John Wick
summary: A retired hitman takes violent revenge on the Russian mob heir who killed his dog and stole his car.

title: The Dark Knight
summary: Gotham's masked vigilante and its district attorney try to dismantle organized crime as the Joker spreads chaos.

title: How to fix a flat tire
summary: Use a jack to lift the car, remove the lug nuts in a star pattern, swap on the spare wheel, lower the car, and tighten the nuts in reverse.

title: Going fishing at the lake
summary: Cast your line into the water, wait patiently for a bite, reel in carefully when you feel a tug, and release smaller catches.

title: Pasta carbonara recipe
summary: Boil spaghetti until al dente, fry pancetta until crisp, whisk eggs with grated Pecorino Romano, combine with hot pasta off the heat.

title: Learning Python basics
summary: Install Python from python.org, write a hello world script, learn variables and loops, then explore lists and dictionaries.
